name: pluginforge
description: Extensibility platform with WebWorker-sandboxed plugin runtime and capability-based permissions.

scripts.build: npm -w @pluginforge/sdk run build && npm -w @pluginforge/core run build && npm -w @pluginforge-examples/hello-plugin run build && npm -w @pluginforge-examples/markdown-plugin run build && npm -w @pluginforge-examples/todo-plugin run build && npm -w @pluginforge/host-app run build
